title: ollama/ollama
summary: Ollama’s official CLI and server for pulling and running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally with GPU/CPU acceleration.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library that wraps Ollama’s REST API for easy LLM inference and chat in Python scripts or notebooks.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers to interact with a local Ollama server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that adds Ollama models as LLM and chat components for chains, agents and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI (formerly Ollama WebUI) that wraps the Ollama API into a ChatGPT-like interface with model management and multi-user support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client for Ollama providing sync/async APIs and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem that wraps the Ollama REST API for Ruby and Rails applications.

title: ollama-cli (typpo)
summary: Lightweight Go CLI that adds conversation history, prompt templates and shell pipe support on top of the Ollama daemon.

title: ollama-copilot (cmiller01)
summary: Experimental VS Code extension that routes GitHub Copilot requests to a local Ollama model for offline code completions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with optional GPU node selection and persistent model storage.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by Ollama team that exposes Ollama models as generators and embedders for semantic search pipelines.

title: ollama-litellm
summary: LiteLLM provider that lets you call Ollama models through the same interface as OpenAI, Anthropic, etc., enabling proxy and cost tracking.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Curated collection of recipes showing how to integrate Ollama with LangChain, LlamaIndex, Docker, GPU stacks, and edge devices.

title: ollama-nestjs
summary: Community NestJS module that injects Ollama client as a service with decorators for chat, embeddings and model management.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official reference repo with Docker Compose stacks for CPU-only and CUDA-enabled Ollama setups plus optional WebUI.

title: ollama-rag (ggerganov)
summary: Minimal Rust example that combines Ollama LLM with llama.cpp embeddings to build a CLI RAG system without Python.

title: r/ollama - Reddit community
summary: Active subreddit for sharing models, troubleshooting, benchmarks and ecosystem announcements around Ollama.

title: Ollama on Hacker News
summary: Discussion thread covering performance tips, comparison to llama.cpp server and roadmap requests for Ollama.

title: Ollama Discord API bots
summary: Community repo hosting several Discord bot examples that connect guilds to local Ollama models for slash-command chat.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Unofficial Dart/Flutter package that exposes Ollama REST endpoints for mobile and desktop apps.
